summary: Fix an @export variable with wrong type hint causing editor warning
prompt: The script exports a `speed` variable as String but uses it in arithmetic as if it were a float. This causes a runtime error. Fix the export type so the variable is properly typed and editor-visible as a float.
evaluation_notes: Bug: @export var speed: String = '200.0' — used as float in velocity calculation. Fix: change type to float and default to 200.0. String arithmetic in GDScript will not crash on multiply but will give wrong result.
